description: List installed extensions and identify their command/metric capabilities (covers `neomind extension list` — previously uncovered)

turns.user: Which extensions are installed in this system? What commands and metrics do they expose?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent calls `neomind extension list` (or GET /api/extensions) and reports a command/metric summary
expectations.overall: Must report the extension count (empty is a valid answer, but must come from a tool call, not a guess)
